Acme Release Desk
Dashboard Pricing

Plans for release teams that need proof before merge.

The pricing fixture gives multi-target audits a second page with different layout, headings, cards, and content density while staying deterministic for CI.

Starter

$0
  • Single-page smoke checks
  • Local HTML report
  • Manual baseline updates

Team

$49
  • Multi-page audit runs
  • PR Risk Ledger summaries
  • Visual diff artifacts

Enterprise

Custom
  • Private target controls
  • Trend dashboards
  • Release provenance
